title: Move VlProcess to verilated_types.h
body:
This should fix #4362.

Process requirement was decoupled from suspendability in #4321.

So if a design has unsuspendable processes that need a VlProcess instance, it causes a C++ error, as VlProcess is defined in verilated_timing.h.

This changes moves the definiton from verilated_timing.h to verilated_types.h and adds a test that would fail before.
